---
title: '**ATDP Report**'
author: "`r paste0('Produced By: ',Sys.getenv('USERNAME'))`"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%a %b %d, %Y @ %X')`"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  word_document: default
documentclass: article
abstract: "**Automatically generated report on user-selected variables from the Agricultural Taxation Data Program administered by Statistics Canada. Results are as-is and not subject to the original programmer's review.**"
fontsize: 11pt
header-includes: \usepackage[default]{droidsans} \usepackage{geometry} \geometry{top=1in,left=1in,bottom=1in,right=1in}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r load_packages, include=FALSE}

present_packages<-as.data.frame(installed.packages())$Package

weird_packages<-c("vctrs",
                  "xfun")

needed_weird_packages<-setdiff(weird_packages,
                               present_packages)

if(length(needed_weird_packages)>0){
  for(i in 1:length(needed_weird_packages)){
    install.packages(needed_weird_packages[i],
                     dependencies = TRUE)
  }
  rm(i)
}

required_packages<-c("tidyverse",
                     "devtools",
                     "tinytex",
                     "kableExtra",
                     "lubridate",
                     "stringr",
                     "remotes")

needed_packages<-setdiff(required_packages,
                         present_packages)

if(length(needed_packages)>0){
  for(i in 1:length(needed_packages)){
    install.packages(needed_packages[i],
                     dependencies = TRUE)
  }
  rm(i)
}

library(tidyverse)
library(devtools)
library(tinytex)
library(kableExtra)
library(lubridate)
library(stringr)
library(remotes)

if(sum(as.numeric(present_packages=="qs"))==0){
  remotes::install_version("qs", version = "0.27.3")
}

if(sum(as.numeric(present_packages=="statcanR"))==0){
  pak::pak('warint/statcanR')
}

library(statcanR)

rm(present_packages,
   weird_packages,
   needed_weird_packages,
   required_packages,
   needed_packages)

```


```{r import_data, include=FALSE}

todays_date<-paste0("(",
                    month(ymd(Sys.Date()),label = TRUE),". ",
                    day(ymd(Sys.Date())),", ",
                    year(ymd(Sys.Date())),")")

```

\newpage

# Preamble



# Report for Selected Variables

```{r process_data, include=FALSE}



```

```{r produce_report, results='asis',echo=FALSE}



```
